shortDescription.text: Identifies benign documentation enhancement tools with no malicious indicators.

fullDescription.text: This rule confirms legitimate documentation templates, README generators, and footer enhancement tools that provide standard markdown content with links to legitimate platforms. No exploit primitives, credential theft, data exfiltration, or malicious infrastructure present.

message.text: VERIFICATION CONFIRMED: This skill is a legitimate README footer template. Initial classification (LIKELY_BENIGN, threat_score: 5) is CORRECT and VERIFIED. Threat Intelligence REFUTES all malicious archetypes (reverse shells, DLL side-loading, agent hijacking, credential theft). No exploit primitives, obfuscation, or malicious infrastructure detected. All links reference legitimate platforms (youtube.com, github.com, linkedin.com, twitter.com). Behavior matches standard open-source documentation enhancement tools. No suspicious lines identified. Final threat_score: 8/100 (minimal heuristic noise). Classification: BENIGN.

description.text: README footer template skill (no specific file path provided in source)
